transcription.text: How does the happiness of this family show you that Mum uses Rinse-O? Well, it's natural, isn't it, that people who are dressed in Bright's clean things feel bright and gay. Even if you didn't know that tablecloth was Rinse-O washed, you could bet that the sight of it looking so crisp and bright would make any woman feel proud and happy. Yes, there's something about the bright, happy look of this whole family that makes people stop, look, and admire. Admiring their happiness, their bright, clean look. A tribute to Mother who knows nothing beats New Rinse-O's richer, softer suds. Here's New Rinse-O. New Rinse-O's richer, softer suds with extra cleaning action. With extra brightness. Extra brightness. Extra satisfaction. New Rinse-O. New Rinse-O.
